name: Riparian Studios
self_description: Kit Kohler founded Riparian Studios in Nevada City after nearly a decade making ads for national brand campaigns in San Francisco. The move was deliberate: toward clients whose work matters to this specific place, and away from distance-produced content that never quite lands.

name: SRC Event Rentals
self_description: Since 1975, SRC Event Rentals has been at the forefront of making every event in Nevada County unforgettable. Our legacy is built on providing unparalleled customer service and an extensive selection of party and event rental equipment.

name: Sierra Custom Ink
self_description: For over 40 years, our family-run team has been weaving together expertise across the creative industries, marketing, design, and—more recently—screen printing, embroidery, and promotional branding. Having lived, worked, and rooted ourselves here in Nevada County, this is more than just business—it's home.

name: Sierra Rose Alpacas
self_description: An Environmentally Friendly Way to Enrich Your Family's Lifestyle

name: Someone Said Yes DJ and Photo Booth
self_description: A Boutique DJ & Photo Booth Company. We have two home bases. One in St. Augustine, FL, and a second in Nevada City, CA. Music is just part of the job—we're here to bring the energy, manage the vibe, and create the kind of dance floor memories that live in group chats forever.

name: Waking Crow Studio
self_description: Waking Crow is the working name of a multimodal artist, poet, and photographer working and living in the ancient Nisenan Lands that border the Tahoe National Forest.

name: Yinne Boma Animation Studios Company
self_description: Our mission is to Entertain the world through Animation, Cartoon Films & TV Presentations, Live Action Films & TV Shows and Other Media, Entertainment and Arts. Our Motto: Imagine It, Believe It, Live It, Do It.

name: You Bet! Bicycle Sales & Service
self_description: Gateway To The Sierra. Fast, friendly, and professional bicycle repair. We service all bikes and love everything on two wheels! Focused on engaging and expanding the mountain biking, bikepacking, road, and gravel community.

name: Fieldmouse Press
self_description: Fieldmouse Press is a nonprofit publisher of comics and literature, based in Grass Valley, California. Founded in 2019 to publish SOLRAD, the online literary magazine for comics, we are committed to expanding the reach and appreciation of the comics arts.

name: Foggy Mountain Music
self_description: Nestled in Grass Valley, California since 1975, our store stands as a treasure trove for all things musical. We pride ourselves on offering a unique blend of musical instruments, which goes beyond the offerings of conventional music retailers.

name: Full Circle Press
self_description: Harold Berliner began letterpress printing in Nevada City, 70 years ago. Judith, his daughter, learned how to run a hand fed Chandler Price when she was 14. She returned home in 1991 to join her dad in the same location she learned how to print. Hence, the name Full Circle Press.

name: Gold City Guitar Repair
self_description: As a builder of instruments, as well as a player, I am keenly aware of the dynamic relationship one may have with an instrument. My intent with Gold City Guitar is to provide a personalized and intimate service to the Sierra foothills community.

name: Nevada County Doris Foley Library for Historical Research
self_description: The Doris Foley Library for Historical Research is a non-circulating branch of the Nevada County Library system. It is housed in a Romanesque Revival architectural style Carnegie library building completed in 1907.
